primary_source: Gross2001; Gross2002; legacy MEA parameter set
data_or_basis: Non-electrolyte PC-SAFT CO2 parameterization used as inherited molecular component.

primary_source: Baygi2015; Nasrifar2010; legacy MEA parameter set
data_or_basis: Associating neutral amine parameterization retained as the molecular MEA basis.

status: not promoted in validated MEA runtime set
data_or_basis: Figiel et al. report solvent f_k values near 1.5 for water/alcohol solvents, but applying an MEA transfer value degraded the current MEA speciation validation; the promoted MEA runtime set therefore keeps f_solv=1 pending direct MEA dielectric/activity regression.
Water PC-SAFT parameters and SSM+DS f_k=1.5 from modified Born ePC-SAFT literature.

status: fitted to real MEA speciation data
data_or_basis: Direct MEAH+ NMR/speciation targets in Tier A local data.
All ions use relative dielectric constant 8 and f_solv=1 in SSM+DS; charge and molecular weight from species definition.

status: fitted to real MEA speciation data
data_or_basis: Direct carbamate NMR/speciation targets in Tier A local data; MEAH+/MEACOO- interaction fitted with same subset.

status: literature-backed ionic conventions plus corrected molecular weight
data_or_basis: All ions use relative dielectric constant 8 and f_solv=1 in SSM+DS; MW corrected to MEA+CO2-H = 0.10408 kg/mol.

status: literature-backed diagnostic parameter set with trace Born fit check
primary_source: Held2014 Table 2; Uyan2015 Tables 4-5; Figiel2025 SSM+DS convention
data_or_basis: HCO3- uses Held/Uyan sigma=2.9296 and e=70.00, water-ion k_ij=0.0, epsilon_r=8 and f_solv=1 ionic conventions. A Tier A trace-carbonate Born fit against HCO3-/CO3^2- speciation targets converged to d_born=2.9990, so the promoted d_born=3.0 is retained as a fit-supported validation value.

status: literature-backed diagnostic parameter set with trace Born fit check
primary_source: Held2014 Table 2; Uyan2015 Tables 4-5; Figiel2025 SSM+DS convention
data_or_basis: CO3^2- uses Held/Uyan sigma=2.4422 and e=249.26, water-ion k_ij=-0.25, epsilon_r=8 and f_solv=1 ionic conventions. A Tier A trace-carbonate Born fit against HCO3-/CO3^2- speciation targets converged to d_born=2.9998, so the promoted d_born=3.0 is retained as a fit-supported validation value.

status: literature-backed diagnostic parameter set with SSM+DS Born value
primary_source: Held2014 Table 2; Uyan2015 Tables 4-5; Figiel2025 Table 3
data_or_basis: H3O+ is the runtime proton carrier for H+ activity coefficients. It uses Held/Uyan H+ sigma=3.4654 and e=500.00, water-ion k_ij=0.25, Figiel2025 H+ d_born=1.218, epsilon_r=8, and f_solv=1.

status: literature-backed diagnostic parameter set with hydration Born derivation
primary_source: Held2014 Table 2; Uyan2015 Tables 4-5; Jacobs1985; PalascakShields2004 hydration-energy lead; Figiel2025 SSM+DS convention
data_or_basis: OH- uses Held/Uyan sigma=2.0177 and e=650.00, water-ion k_ij=-0.25, epsilon_r=8 and f_solv=1 ionic conventions. Its promoted d_born=3.081076894 is derived by Born hydration-energy inversion from an absolute hydroxide hydration free energy of 106.4 kcal/mol and documented as a literature-backed estimate, not an MEA-system regression.
